_comment: EXAMPLE of the hook + env block install/2-windows-config.ps1 registers into your real ~/.claude/settings.json. NOT deployed verbatim — the installer patches your live file programmatically, merging these entries with any existing hooks. Shown here as a scrubbed reference for manual recovery. Replace <WIN_USER> with your Windows username and <DISTRO> with your WSL distro. NOTE (2026-06-25): the installer resolves and prefers PowerShell 7 (pwsh) as the runner for these PowerShell hooks AND the nightly dream Task Scheduler entry (falling back to powershell.exe only if pwsh is absent) — Windows PowerShell 5.1 silently broke the dream under Task Scheduler (empty $LASTEXITCODE, lost codex token counts, autopromote dying mid-loop). The literal 'powershell.exe' below is illustrative.
